title: Inpaint detail bounded target-runtime smoke certificate
certified_scope: One RealVisXL no-mouth v4 micro facial-detail inpaint target-runtime sample with static proof, successful execution, hash-verified pullback, technical integrity, and whole-image visual pass with notes.
retained_notes: The pulled-back output is effectively unchanged from the source at normal visual inspection, so this proves route execution and identity preservation rather than a material detail-improvement claim.
The diagnostic mask covers small facial regions and is runtime input context only, not trusted gold truth.
Slight smoothness in masked skin remains recorded.
Single-sample evidence does not establish broad robustness.
